common.tagline: Every game deserves a second turn

hero.lede: A marketplace for pre-loved games in Latvia, Lithuania, and Estonia.
hero.imageAlt: Watercolour illustration of a board game with hexagonal tiles, meeples, cards, and coins

features.heading: Built for the Baltic board game scene.

browse.label: Find your game
browse.title: A catalogue backed by BoardGameGeek.
browse.body: Find the right game in a catalogue of 170 000+ titles. Every listing pulls images and details straight from BGG, so you know what edition you're getting.

items.name: BGG-backed search
items.detail: Find the exact edition you're looking for, in your language.

items.name: Condition badges
items.detail: Five tiers from Like New to For Parts, on every listing.

items.name: Edition tracking
items.detail: Each copy tracks its publisher, language, and edition year.

items.name: Wanted listings
items.detail: Save games you're hunting and get notified when one lands.

sell.label: List with confidence
sell.title: Three steps from shelf to sold.
sell.body: Search BGG, set your price and condition, drop it in a parcel locker. We handle the label, the payment, and the messaging.

items.name: Five-tier grading
items.detail: Like New, Very Good, Good, Acceptable, or For Parts.

items.name: Auctions or fixed price
items.detail: Pick the format that fits the game.

items.name: 10% commission
items.detail: Charged on the item only, not on shipping.

items.name: Wallet payouts
items.detail: Sales land in your wallet when the order completes.

ship.label: Ship across the Baltics
ship.title: Cross-border parcel lockers.
ship.body: Unisend lockers connect Latvia, Lithuania, and Estonia. Drop off, the buyer collects, tracking is automatic.

items.name: Cross-border lockers
items.detail: Buyers in LV, LT, and EE can order from any seller.

items.name: Buyer-funded shipping
items.detail: Shipping is added at checkout, never bundled into your asking price.

items.name: Automatic tracking
items.detail: Both sides see status updates from drop-off to collection.

items.name: Built-in deadlines
items.detail: Auto-cancel and auto-refund if a parcel doesn't move.

payments.label: Pay safely
payments.title: Licensed payments. People handle disputes.
payments.body: EveryPay handles payments. They're a licensed Estonian payment institution. If something goes wrong, we step in.

items.name: EveryPay processing
items.detail: Bank cards and Baltic bank links in one checkout.

items.name: Wallet for sellers
items.detail: Your earnings land in a wallet you control.

items.name: Dispute resolution
items.detail: If buyer and seller can't agree, we review and decide.

items.name: Order deadlines
items.detail: Acceptance, shipping, and delivery deadlines protect both sides.

items.q: Where can I buy and sell?
items.a: Latvia, Lithuania, and Estonia. Buyers in all three countries see every listing.
Sellers ship through Unisend parcel lockers. Cross-border drop-offs work across all three Baltic countries.
Buyers pay the item price plus shipping. Sellers pay 10% commission on the item price. Shipping isn't commissioned.
Sellers grade each copy on a five-tier scale: Like New, Very Good, Good, Acceptable, or For Parts. Buyers see this on every listing.
EveryPay handles payments. They're a licensed Estonian payment institution. Once an order completes, your earnings land in your platform wallet.
Every order has deadlines for acceptance, shipping, and delivery. If a dispute opens, we review what happened and help resolve it.

cta.heading: Pass them on.
cta.body: List your collection and let other gamers in the Baltics give them another turn.

staleAction.newVersionAvailable: A newer version is available. Please refresh the page.
